message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "user" as user
rectangle "student" as student
rectangle "teacher" as teacher

user -> student : 查看
activate student
student --> user : 返回结果
deactivate student

alt [user:teacher]
    user -> teacher : 查看
    activate teacher
    teacher --> user : 返回结果
    deactivate teacher
end

@enduml
```
